title: Displaced Lebanese woman bakes 3,000 loaves daily for war-hit community
full_text:
Displaced Lebanese woman bakes 3,000 loaves daily for war-hit community
Displaced Lebanese woman bakes 3,000 loaves daily for war-hit community
Soubhiye Zeiter vowed to feed people affected by war even after being displaced from her home. She started by baking 200 mana’eesh every day – but that was just the start.
Published On 21 May 2026
